# External Data Sources

## international_results.csv

- **Source**: [martj42/international_results](https://github.com/martj42/international_results)
- **License**: CC0 (Public Domain)
- **Description**: International football results from 1872 to present
- **Downloaded**: 2026-06-15
- **Coverage**: ~49,000 matches, all national team games
- **Fields**: date, home_team, away_team, home_score, away_score, tournament, city, country, neutral

## shootouts.csv

- **Source**: [martj42/international_results](https://github.com/martj42/international_results)
- **License**: CC0 (Public Domain)
- **Description**: Penalty shootout results for international matches
- **Downloaded**: 2026-06-15

## former_names.csv

- **Source**: [martj42/international_results](https://github.com/martj42/international_results)
- **License**: CC0 (Public Domain)
- **Description**: Country name changes over time (e.g., Yugoslavia -> Serbia)
- **Downloaded**: 2026-06-15

## elo-ratings-2026.json

- **Source**: [World Football Elo Ratings](https://www.eloratings.net/)
- **License**: Data derived from public TSV feed; used for non-commercial prediction system
- **Description**: Elo ratings snapshot for 48 World Cup teams
- **Downloaded**: 2026-06-12

## Usage Policy

- All data is used solely for the World Cup prediction system
- No data is redistributed or sold
- Attribution is provided where required by license
- Mock/seed data is clearly labeled and separated from real data
